about.title: Engineering trust into every
about.subtitle: Cehpoint is an India-headquartered IT, AI, and cybersecurity firm. We build the software, run the security, and stand behind the code — for hundreds of teams across the world.

demoDelivery.title: See it working,
demoDelivery.subtitle: Web prototype in 24 hours. Mobile MVP in 7 days. You pay only when the demo earns your trust.

careers.subtitle: We hire engineers who ship — and stay. Real ownership, senior mentorship, fair pay, no corporate theatre.

training.title: Learn the skills that
training.subtitle: Practical, project-based programs taught by engineers who have built in production. No theory dumps.

aboutSections.mission: Make enterprise-grade software, AI, and cybersecurity accessible to every business — not only the ones with a Series B cheque. A village retailer in Birbhum and a Fortune 500 CIO in New York should both feel they got expert craft for a fair price.
aboutSections.vision: Be the partner clients call first — for the next product launch, the next compliance audit, and the next strategic bet — because we have already earned the right with the last one.
aboutSections.principlesTitle: Four commitments that govern every engagement
aboutSections.principlesSub: These are not aspirations on a slide. They are the contract you can hold us to from the first call.
aboutSections.whatWeDoTitle: From a single landing page to a national-scale platform
aboutSections.whatWeDoSub: Six core practices, one accountable team. Every project is led by a senior engineer who has shipped in production — not a sales rep with a slide deck.
aboutSections.storySub: We did not raise a funding round and announce it on stage. We took on one client, kept them, then took on the next. Four years in, that compounding is the company.
aboutSections.closingTitle: Tell us what you're building. We'll tell you what it costs and how fast we can ship it.
aboutSections.closingSub: Most calls take 25 minutes. By the end of one, you'll have an honest scope, a working budget, and the name of the senior engineer who'd lead delivery.

processSteps.title: UX/UI Design

processSteps.title: Development

processSteps.title: Maintenance

demoProcessSteps.title: Requirements Capture

demoProcessSteps.title: Demo Handoff

labels.panelDesc: Specialized machine learning and computer vision architectures designed explicitly for {{industry}} challenges.

retail.title: Dynamic Pricing Engine
retail.pain: Static pricing leaves money on the table while competitors constantly adjust to market demand.
retail.fix: ML algorithms adjust your product prices in real-time based on competitor scraping and demand surges.
retail.gain: Increase profit margins by 12-18% without losing competitive edge.

retail.title: Visual Product Search
retail.pain: Shoppers struggle to find the exact clothing or furniture item using text keywords.
retail.fix: Computer vision allows users to upload a photo and instantly find similar products in your catalog.
retail.gain: Boost average order value and increase search-to-cart conversions.

retail.title: Hyper-Personalized Merchandising
retail.pain: Every visitor sees the same generic storefront, leading to high bounce rates.
retail.fix: AI reorganizes the homepage and product grids dynamically for each user based on their past behavior.
retail.gain: Increase repeat purchase rate and customer lifetime value.

finance.title: Credit Risk Scoring Models
finance.pain: Traditional credit scores exclude viable borrowers and rely on outdated, limited data.
finance.fix: Advanced AI models analyze alternative data points (digital footprint, utility bills) to assess true risk.
finance.gain: Safely approve 20% more loan applications while maintaining low default rates.

finance.title: Algorithmic Wealth Advisory
finance.pain: Human financial advisors are too expensive for the mass market, limiting client acquisition.
finance.fix: Robo-advisors generate optimized, personalized, tax-efficient investment portfolios at scale.
finance.gain: Scale asset management to thousands of clients with zero variable cost.

finance.title: Anti-Money Laundering (AML)
finance.pain: Legacy rule-based AML systems generate 95% false positives, burying compliance teams.
finance.fix: Network graph analysis and ML spot sophisticated laundering rings across complex transaction webs.
finance.gain: Slash compliance investigation time and avoid severe regulatory fines.

healthcare.title: Medical Imaging Diagnostics
healthcare.pain: Radiologists suffer from fatigue, leading to delayed or missed diagnoses on subtle X-rays/MRIs.
healthcare.fix: Computer vision algorithms pre-screen scans, highlighting micro-anomalies with superhuman precision.
healthcare.gain: Detect conditions like tumors 30% faster with higher accuracy rates.

healthcare.title: Predictive Vitals Monitoring
healthcare.pain: Nurses manually checking vitals react to deterioration only after it happens.
healthcare.fix: Real-time AI analysis of continuous ICU streams predicts cardiac or sepsis events hours in advance.
healthcare.gain: Reduce ICU mortality rates and shorten average hospital stays.

healthcare.title: Drug Discovery Acceleration
healthcare.pain: Identifying new drug compounds takes years of trial and error in expensive laboratories.
healthcare.fix: Generative AI simulates molecular structures and predicts their binding affinity to target proteins.
healthcare.gain: Cut early-stage drug discovery timelines from years to months.

manufacturing.title: IoT Predictive Maintenance
manufacturing.pain: Machinery breaking down unexpectedly halts the entire production line, costing millions.
manufacturing.fix: Sensors feed vibration and temperature data to AI, predicting specific part failures weeks before they snap.
manufacturing.gain: Achieve near-zero unplanned downtime and extend equipment lifespan.

manufacturing.title: Visual Defect Detection
manufacturing.pain: Human QA inspectors get tired and miss microscopic flaws on high-speed conveyor belts.
manufacturing.fix: High-speed cameras with edge AI inspect 100% of products, instantly rejecting sub-millimeter defects.
manufacturing.gain: Eliminate defective product shipments and reduce QA labor costs.

manufacturing.title: Digital Twin Simulation
manufacturing.pain: Testing new factory layouts or processes in the real world is risky and expensive.
manufacturing.fix: Create a virtual AI replica of your factory floor to simulate bottlenecks and optimize throughput safely.
manufacturing.gain: Increase factory yield by 15% without physical trial-and-error.

real_estate.title: Automated Property Valuation
real_estate.pain: Manual appraisals are slow, biased, and often lag behind rapidly changing neighborhood data.
real_estate.fix: AI aggregates thousands of data points (crime rates, school zones, past sales) for instant, hyper-accurate pricing.
real_estate.gain: Price properties perfectly for faster sales and higher yields.

real_estate.title: Generative Virtual Staging
real_estate.pain: Physically staging an empty home or hiring 3D rendering artists is expensive and slow.
real_estate.fix: Upload a raw photo of an empty room, and AI instantly populates it with photorealistic, trendy furniture.
real_estate.gain: Increase listing click-through rates by 40% at zero marginal cost.

real_estate.title: Smart Building Energy Management
real_estate.pain: HVAC systems waste enormous amounts of energy cooling empty commercial floors.
real_estate.fix: AI analyzes occupancy patterns and weather forecasts to dynamically optimize building temperatures.
real_estate.gain: Cut commercial energy bills by 20% and lower carbon footprint.

education.title: Adaptive Learning Paths
education.pain: A one-size-fits-all curriculum leaves advanced students bored and struggling students behind.
education.fix: AI analyzes a student's quiz performance to dynamically adjust the difficulty and topic of the next lesson.
education.gain: Boost student test scores and engagement exponentially.

education.title: Predictive Dropout Prevention
education.pain: Schools often don't realize a student is at risk of dropping out until they stop attending.
education.fix: Machine learning flags subtle behavioral changes (login frequency, assignment delays) for early intervention.
education.gain: Improve student retention rates and graduation outcomes.

education.title: Automated Essay Grading
education.pain: Teachers spend countless weekend hours subjectively grading hundreds of long-form essays.
education.fix: NLP models grade essays for grammar, structure, and thematic relevance, providing instant feedback.
education.gain: Free up 30% of teacher time to focus on actual student mentorship.

logistics.title: Dynamic Route Optimization
logistics.pain: Static delivery routes waste fuel and fail to account for live traffic, weather, or new pickups.
logistics.fix: AI continuously recalculates the optimal delivery sequence for hundreds of trucks in real-time.
logistics.gain: Reduce fleet fuel consumption by 15% and improve on-time deliveries.

logistics.title: Autonomous Warehouse Robotics
logistics.pain: Human pickers spend 70% of their shift just walking between aisles to find items.
logistics.fix: Computer-vision guided robots autonomously navigate warehouses to bring the correct shelves directly to the packers.
logistics.gain: Multiply order fulfillment speed by 3x during peak seasons.

logistics.title: Last-Mile Delivery Prediction
logistics.pain: Customers are frustrated by inaccurate delivery windows spanning entire days.
logistics.fix: Predictive models calculate highly accurate ETA windows based on historical driver speeds and micro-local data.
logistics.gain: Dramatically increase customer satisfaction and reduce support calls.

legal.title: Contract Risk Analysis
legal.pain: Lawyers spend tedious hours reading dense 100-page M&A contracts looking for liability loopholes.
legal.fix: AI scans legal documents in seconds, redlining missing clauses and flagging severe compliance risks.
legal.gain: Accelerate due diligence by 80% while minimizing human oversight errors.

legal.title: Case Law Precedent Discovery
legal.pain: Paralegals struggle to find that one obscure, highly relevant court ruling buried in millions of documents.
legal.fix: Semantic AI search understands the context of a case, not just keywords, to surface perfect precedents.
legal.gain: Build stronger litigation strategies in a fraction of the research time.

legal.title: IP & Trademark Infringement Scanning
legal.pain: Protecting a brand globally is impossible when relying on manual web searches for copycats.
legal.fix: Computer vision continuously scrapes the web and global registries to find visually similar logos or stolen IP.
legal.gain: Protect brand equity actively with zero manual monitoring effort.

serviceEcommerce.case1Desc: Built a multi-vendor fashion marketplace with advanced search, personalized recommendations, and seamless checkout experience.
serviceEcommerce.case1Quote: Our revenue tripled within 6 months. The platform is fast, reliable, and our customers love the experience.
serviceEcommerce.case2Desc: Developed a high-performance e-commerce platform with real-time inventory, multiple payment options, and omnichannel integration.
serviceEcommerce.case2Quote: The platform handles Black Friday traffic effortlessly. Best investment we've made in our digital infrastructure.

serviceEcommerce.kpisSub: Measurable outcomes we deliver for e-commerce success

faqs.q: How long does it take to launch an e-commerce store?
faqs.a: Timeline depends on complexity and customization, but typically ranges from 2-4 months for a full-featured store. We can launch a basic store in 3-4 weeks with iterative enhancements.

faqs.q: What payment gateways do you support?
faqs.a: We integrate with all major payment gateways including Stripe, PayPal, Razorpay, Square, and regional providers. We also support digital wallets, buy-now-pay-later services, and cryptocurrency payments.

faqs.q: How do you optimize for conversions?
faqs.a: We implement proven conversion optimization techniques including fast page loads, simplified checkout, personalized recommendations, abandoned cart recovery, A/B testing, and mobile-first design.

faqs.q: Can you handle high traffic volumes?
faqs.a: Absolutely. Our platforms are built on scalable cloud infrastructure with auto-scaling, CDN integration, and caching strategies to handle traffic spikes during sales events and seasonal peaks.

faqs.q: Do you provide ongoing maintenance and support?
faqs.a: Yes, we offer comprehensive support including 24/7 monitoring, security updates, performance optimization, feature enhancements, and dedicated support teams with guaranteed response times.

serviceEcommerce.ctaDesc: Get a detailed quotation with AI-powered analysis, conversion optimization strategy, and technical recommendations for your e-commerce project.

kpis.description: Active participation and course completion rates

faqs.q: How long does it take to implement an LMS?
faqs.a: Implementation timelines vary based on customization needs, but typically range from 3-6 months for a full-featured LMS. We can have a basic system running within 4-6 weeks with phased rollouts.

faqs.q: Is the platform accessible for students with disabilities?
faqs.a: Yes, all our educational platforms are built to WCAG 2.1 AA standards, ensuring accessibility for students with visual, auditory, motor, and cognitive disabilities. We include screen reader support, keyboard navigation, and customizable interfaces.

faqs.q: How do you protect student data and privacy?
faqs.a: We comply with FERPA, COPPA, and GDPR regulations. All student data is encrypted, access is role-based, and we implement comprehensive audit logging. Parents have full control over their children's data.

faqs.q: Can you integrate with our existing systems?
faqs.a: Absolutely. We integrate with popular SIS systems, Google Classroom, Microsoft Teams, Zoom, and other educational tools through standard protocols like LTI, OneRoster, and custom APIs.

faqs.q: What training and support do you provide?
faqs.a: We provide comprehensive training for administrators, teachers, and students, along with detailed documentation and video tutorials. Our support team is available 24/7 during critical periods like exam seasons.

serviceEdutech.ctaDesc: Get a comprehensive quotation with AI-powered analysis, feature roadmap, and implementation timeline for your educational technology project.

faqs.q: How long does it take to build a fintech platform?
faqs.a: Timeline varies based on complexity, but typically ranges from 4-9 months for a full-featured platform. We follow an agile approach with regular releases, so you can start seeing value within the first 6-8 weeks.

Yes, compliance is built into our development process. We have extensive experience with PCI-DSS, KYC/AML, GDPR, SOX, and regional banking regulations. Our team includes compliance specialists who ensure your platform meets all requirements.

faqs.q: What security measures do you implement?
faqs.a: We implement end-to-end encryption, multi-factor authentication, real-time fraud detection, secure API gateways, regular security audits, and comprehensive audit logging. All our solutions are built with security-first architecture.

faqs.q: Can you integrate with existing banking systems?
faqs.a: Absolutely. We have extensive experience integrating with core banking systems, payment gateways, credit bureaus, and third-party financial services through secure APIs and industry-standard protocols.

faqs.q: What ongoing support do you provide?
faqs.a: We offer 24/7 monitoring, regular security updates, performance optimization, compliance updates, and dedicated support teams. Our SLA guarantees 99.9% uptime with rapid incident response.

serviceFintech.ctaDesc: Get a detailed quotation with AI-powered analysis, compliance roadmap, and technical architecture for your fintech project.

solutions.title: Digital Skill Centers
solutions.desc: Establish local IT training centers to equip youth with modern skills and software knowledge.

serviceRural.ctaDesc: Partner with Cehpoint to modernize your region. We provide the technology; you provide the local leadership.

servicePartner.heroSubtitle: We bridge the gap between traditional professional excellence and the digital economy. Get access to premium clients, guaranteed rates, and lightning-fast payouts.
servicePartner.pillarsSub: Four pillars designed to protect your time and maximize your revenue.

corePillars.title: Zero Acquisition Cost
corePillars.description: We handle the marketing and client vetting. You focus entirely on delivery.

corePillars.title: Fixed Rates
corePillars.description: Transparent, pre-negotiated project rates ensure your revenue is predictable.

corePillars.title: 45-Minute Payout
corePillars.description: Industry-leading payment speed. Funds released instantly upon project approval.

corePillars.title: Priority Ecosystem
corePillars.description: Cehpoint projects must be your top priority. In return, you get consistent work.

servicePartner.whoSub: Empowering traditional sectors with high-tech client pipelines.

partnerTypes.title: Accounting & Finance
partnerTypes.description: Manage high-value compliance and financial planning for Cehpoint's enterprise clients.

partnerTypes.title: Designers & Creatives
partnerTypes.description: Deliver world-class UI/UX, branding, and digital assets for our global project pipeline.

partnerTypes.title: Studios & Production
partnerTypes.description: Handle professional video production and digital content creation for tech-driven campaigns.

partnerTypes.title: Legal & Compliance
partnerTypes.description: Provide essential legal framework and IP protection services for our hardware and software innovations.

partnerTypes.title: Influencers & PR
partnerTypes.description: Amplify our technological breakthroughs and educational reach through strategic digital influence.

partnerTypes.title: Industry Experts
partnerTypes.description: Join as a domain specialist for niche technical and strategic consulting projects.

payoutSteps.label: Delivery:
payoutSteps.text: Submit your expert work through our priority portal.

payoutSteps.label: Verification:
payoutSteps.text: Our internal QA team performs a 15-minute rapid audit.

payoutSteps.label: Payout:
payoutSteps.text: Direct bank transfer triggered instantly. Funds in your account in under 45 mins.

servicePartner.finalDesc: We are currently accepting highly specialized partners in select regions. Secure your spot in the priority delivery network.
servicePartner.vetNote: Vetting process takes 72 hours. Limited availability by industry category.
